Sandbox_PIP_EnableDebugLogging_tooltip:
Enables verbose debug logging for Phobos' Industrial Pathways: Pathology to the game console.

-OFF (default): Normal operation;
-ON: Verbose logging of all PIP internal operations.

Leave OFF unless actively troubleshooting. Requires a game restart to take effect.
Sandbox_PIP_EnableProximityAutopsy_toolt:
When enabled, adds an 'Autopsy (Lab Table)' context menu option when right-clicking near corpses within range of a ZVV Autopsy Table. Uses the table for improved autopsy results without needing to place the corpse on it first.

-ON (default): Proximity autopsy enabled;
-OFF: Standard ZVV autopsy rules apply.

Requires ZVV (Zombie Virus Vaccine) to be installed.
Sandbox_PIP_AutopsyTableRange_tooltip:
Maximum distance in tiles to search for a nearby Autopsy Table when right-clicking.

Default: 3 tiles.
Range: 1 to 6.

The table must be within this range of the right-click location.
Sandbox_PIP_EnableVehicleAppliances_tool:
When enabled, allows Portable Lab Fridge and Portable Lab Microwave to be installed as vehicle parts. Appliances are injected into all non-trailer vehicles at game boot.

-ON (default): Vehicle appliances available;
-OFF: No appliance parts injected.

Requires a game restart to take effect.
Sandbox_PIP_FridgeBatteryDrainRate_toolt:
Battery drain rate per in-game minute when the Portable Lab Fridge is active.

Default: 0.0003 per minute.
Range: 0.0 to 0.01.

Set to 0 for no battery drain. Higher values drain faster.
Sandbox_PIP_MicrowaveBatteryDrainRate_to:
Battery drain rate per in-game minute when the Portable Lab Microwave is active.

Default: 0.001 per minute.
Range: 0.0 to 0.05.

Set to 0 for no battery drain. Microwave drains faster than fridge.
